calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-19-2017 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The Court orders the balance of this case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court 3.1385. Judge: Teri Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-18-2017 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Sep-19-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT As To Plaintiff S Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Joe B. Lenz And Patrick E. Taylor In Support Thereof; Exhibits
Off Calendar Apr-14-2017 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Eustace de St. Phallle, counsel for Plaintiff Terrence Buckner; Patrick E. Taylor, counsel for Defendant Nibbi Brothers.

The Court calls the calendar and notes the subject of today's hearing. Counsel state their appearances. The Court invites Mr Taylor to address the tentative ruling denying the Motion for Summary Adjudication which is delivered in writing to counsel prior to the commencement of hearing. Mr. Taylor argues the motion noting that the Hooker opinion requires affirmative action on the part of the constrator, not simple negligence. He also objects to the admissibility of the of certain statements in the opposing declarations.

After reply by Mr. de St. Phalle and sur-replies, the Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Hon. Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: Elizabeth J. Wood, CSR#5134, Zandonella Reporting Service, 925-685-6222

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT As To Plaintiff S Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Joe B. Lenz And Patrick E. Taylor In Support Thereof; Exhibits

MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT NIBBI BROS ASSOCIATES, INC.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT - This motion will be heard on April 14, 2017 in department 306 at 9:00 a.m. before Judge Ulmer. If the parties desire a court reporter, they need to meet and confer and make arrangements for one prior to the hearing. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Laura A. Reding, CSR 711 =(302/HEK)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT As To Plaintiff S Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Joe B. Lenz And Patrick E. Taylor In Support Thereof; Exhibits
Off Calendar Feb-02-2017 Continued To Apr-10-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Eustace de Saint Phalle, of Rains Lucia Stern, PC, Tel. 415.341.9341, for plaintiffs;
Patrick Taylor, of Bremer White, Tel. 510.480.4851, for defendants Nibbi Bros Associates, Inc.

Ruling: A R G U E D. The Court GRANTS plaintiff's request for continuance under CCP 437c(h) for discovery. DEFENDANT NIBBI BROS ASSOCIATES, INC.
